info.title: Evolution V2 Layer
info.description: Pilot Status API Layer — Evolution V2. Base URL `https://pilotstatus.com.br/api/layer/evolution-v2`. Authenticate with the `apikey` header (your Pilot Status `ps_` key). Instance/session endpoints are NOT available through the layer.

apiKey.name: apikey
apiKey.description: Your Pilot Status API key (ps_...). Evolution GO also accepts `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

post.description: Offers a voice or video call to a recipient number for a bounded ringing duration.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone number in international format.

callDuration.description: How long the call rings, in seconds (1–15).

isVideo.description: `true` for a video call, `false` for voice.

post.description: Fetches the product catalog for a business WhatsApp number.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Business phone number whose catalog to fetch; defaults to the instance's own number.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return.

post.description: Fetches the catalog collections for a business WhatsApp number.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Business phone number whose collections to fetch; defaults to the instance's own number.

limit.description: Maximum number of collections to return.

post.description: Checks whether one or more numbers are registered on WhatsApp.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

numbers.description: Array of numeric phone strings (E.164 without symbols) to verify.

post.description: Marks one or more messages as read (sends read receipts).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

readMessages.description: Array of message key objects to mark as read.

readMessages[].fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this number.

readMessages[].remoteJid.description: Chat JID the message belongs to.

post.description: Archives or unarchives a chat.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

lastMessage.description: Reference to the chat's last message.

lastMessage.messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last message.

post.description: Marks a chat as unread.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

lastMessage.description: Reference to the chat's last message.

lastMessage.messageTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last message.

delete.description: Deletes a message for all participants in the chat.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

fromMe.description: Whether the message was sent by this number.

remoteJid.description: Chat JID the message belongs to.

post.description: Downloads a media message and returns it as a base64 string.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

message.description: Full message object, or an object carrying only `key` so it can be fetched.

convertToMp4.description: Convert the media to MP4 when applicable.

post.description: Edits the text of a message previously sent by this number.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient number / chat the message was sent to.

key.description: Key of the message to edit (`id`, `remoteJid`, `fromMe`).

post.description: Sends a presence indicator (typing, recording, etc.) to a chat.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient number.

delay.description: Duration in milliseconds to keep the presence active.

post.description: Blocks or unblocks a contact.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Contact number to block/unblock.

get.description: Returns the chat matching the given remote JID. Pass `remoteJid` as a required query parameter (e.g. `?remoteJid=5511999999999@s.whatsapp.net`); there is no request body.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Searches stored contacts, optionally filtered by a `where` clause. Send an empty body to return all contacts.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Searches stored messages, optionally filtered by a `where` clause and limited by `limit`.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

post.description: Searches message delivery/read status updates, optionally filtered by a `where` clause and limited by `limit`.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

post.description: Returns stored chats, optionally filtered by a `where` clause. Send an empty body to return all chats.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp group with a subject and an initial list of participants.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

participants.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to add as members.

profilePicture.description: URL of the group profile picture.

promoteParticipants.description: Promote the added participants to admins.

post.description: Changes the name/subject of an existing group.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Sets the group profile picture from an image URL.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

image.description: URL of the new group picture.

post.description: Updates the group's description text.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

get.description: Returns metadata for a single group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter (e.g. `?groupJid=120363000000000000@g.us`).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns every group the number belongs to. The required `getParticipants` query parameter (`"true"` or `"false"`) controls whether each group's participant list is included.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the participant list of a group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the current invite code/link for a group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the group information behind an invite code. Pass the code as the `inviteCode` query parameter (e.g. `?inviteCode=F1EX5QZxO181L3TMVP31gY`).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Joins a group using an invite code. Pass the code as the `inviteCode` query parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Sends the group invite link to one or more phone numbers.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

description.description: Message text sent alongside the invite.

numbers.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to send the invite to.

post.description: Revokes the current invite link and generates a new one.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Adds, removes, promotes, or demotes group participants.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

participants.description: Phone numbers (digits only) to apply the action to.

post.description: Updates a group's messaging and editing permissions.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Controls who is allowed to add new members to the group.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

post.description: Enables or disables disappearing messages for the group.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupJid.description: Group JID (may also be sent as a `groupJid` query parameter).

delete.description: Removes the connected number from the group. Pass the group JID as the `groupJid` query parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns all labels defined on the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter (the number's display name).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Adds or removes a label on a chat for the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone number in international format (non-empty).

labelId.description: Identifier of the label to apply or remove (non-empty).

post.description: Sends an approved WhatsApp template message to a recipient.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

webhookUrl.description: Optional per-message webhook URL for status callbacks.

post.description: Sends a plain text message, optionally with a link preview and mentions.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

linkPreview.description: Whether to render a preview for URLs in the text.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an image, video, document, or audio file by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

media.description: Public URL (or base64) of the media file.

caption.description: Caption text shown with the media.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a PTV (round video note) by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

video.description: Public URL (or base64) of the video file.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a WhatsApp voice/PTT audio by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

audio.description: Public URL (or base64) of the audio file.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Publishes a status (story) as text or media by public URL (media file upload is also supported).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

content.description: Status text, or the public URL of the media.

statusJidList.description: Recipient JIDs (numeric strings) allowed to see the status.

allContacts.description: Publish to all contacts instead of a JID list.

post.description: Sends a sticker by public URL (base64 and multipart file upload are also supported).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

sticker.description: Public URL (or base64) of the sticker image.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a geographic location pin with a name and address.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends one or more contact cards (vCards).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

contact.description: Array of contact objects (see fields below).

post.description: Reacts to an existing message with an emoji.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Sends a poll with selectable options.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

selectableCount.description: How many options can be selected (0–10).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an interactive list message with sections and selectable rows.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

footerText.description: Footer text shown below the list.

buttonText.description: Label of the button that opens the list.

sections.description: Array of section objects (see fields below).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends an interactive buttons message. Each button `type` is one of `reply`, `copy`, `url`, `call`, `pix`.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

buttons.description: Array of button objects (see fields below).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Sends a carousel of cards, each with text, an optional thumbnail, and its own buttons.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Recipient phone in E.164 without `+`, or a JID.

cards.description: Array of card objects (see fields below).

cards[].thumbnailUrl.description: URL of the card thumbnail image.

cards[].buttons.description: Buttons for the card (same shape as sendButtons).

mentioned.description: Array of numeric strings to mention.

post.description: Fetches the profile picture URL of a WhatsApp contact.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Phone number or JID whose profile picture URL to fetch.

post.description: Fetches the WhatsApp Business profile (category, description, email, website) of a number.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Phone number or JID of the business account to inspect.

post.description: Fetches the full profile (name, status, picture, business flag) of a contact.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

number.description: Phone number or JID whose profile to fetch.

post.description: Updates the connected number's own WhatsApp display name.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

name.description: New display name for the connected number.

post.description: Updates the connected number's own "about" / status text.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

status.description: New status/about text for the connected number.

post.description: Updates the connected number's own profile picture from a URL or base64 image.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

picture.description: Image as a public URL or a base64-encoded string.

delete.description: Removes the connected number's own profile picture. Targets the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

get.description: Returns the connected number's current privacy settings. Targets the number identified by the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Updates the connected number's privacy settings; all six fields are required.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

groupadd.description: Who can add to groups: `all`, `contacts`, `contact_blacklist`, or `none`.

post.description: Sets the behavior settings for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

msgCall.description: Message sent to the caller when a call is rejected.

alwaysOnline.description: Keep the connection presence as always online.

readMessages.description: Automatically mark incoming messages as read.

readStatus.description: Automatically mark status/story updates as read.

syncFullHistory.description: Sync the full message history on connect.

wavoipToken.description: WAVOIP token used to enable voice-call handling.

example.msgCall: Sorry, I can't take calls right now.

get.description: Returns the current settings for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Sets the outbound proxy for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

enabled.description: Whether the proxy is enabled for this instance.

host.description: Proxy host name or IP address.

get.description: Returns the current proxy configuration for the instance named in the `{instance}` path parameter.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

post.description: Returns the stored media records for the instance, optionally filtered by the given fields.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

id.description: Media record identifier to filter by.

messageId.description: Message identifier the media belongs to.

post.description: Resolves a media record by `id` and returns a temporary presigned download URL along with the media metadata.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

expiry.description: Lifetime of the presigned URL, in seconds (numeric string, e.g. `"3600"`).

post.description: Creates a new message template for the instance.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

components.description: Template component objects (header, body, footer, buttons).

allowCategoryChange.description: Allow Meta to reassign the category during review.

webhookUrl.description: URL notified about template status changes.

post.description: Updates an existing template identified by its Meta template ID.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

allowCategoryChange.description: Allow Meta to reassign the category during review.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for authentication templates, in seconds.

components.text: Ola {{1}}, seu pedido {{2}} esta a caminho.

delete.description: Deletes a template by name (optionally scoped by its HSM ID).

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.

name.description: Name of the template to delete.

hsmId.description: Specific HSM/template ID to target a single language version.

get.description: Returns all templates registered for the instance. The instance display name is taken from the path.

parameters.name: instance
parameters.description: The number's display name in the Pilot Status dashboard.
